mapped_columns.Watch and wait: Date of death: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.
mapped_columns.12 week MRI: Date: T3b, N1, CRM clear, EMVI negative. Patient wishes to avoid surgery, consider CRT.
mapped_columns.Baseline CT: EMVI(h): T3b, N1, CRM clear, EMVI negative. Patient wishes to avoid surgery, consider CRT.
mapped_columns.12 week MRI: mrT: Plan neoadjuvant CRT and repeat MRI in 6 weeks.
